name: Analog Devices
analysis: ADI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at $439.7000. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $445.4800, stop $379.4868, target $643.4596 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
